allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(r.get\('datos',{}\).get\('accessToken','ERROR'\)[:80] if r.get\('exito'\) else str\(r\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(p['id'], p['estado']['codigo']\) for p in r.get\('datos',{}\).get\('datos',[]\)]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); d=r.get\('datos',[]\); [print\(s['id'],s['nombre']\) for s in d[:3]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('exito:', r['exito'], '| nueva_asig:', r.get\('datos',{}\).get\('id','?'\)[:8]\)")
